---
title: "transcriptomics_day1_ankur"
format: html
---

```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "pheatmap")
bioc_pkgs <- c("DESeq2", "clusterProfiler", "Rsubread", "systemPipeRdata", "Rqc", "QuasR")
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
new_pkgs <- c(cran_pkgs, bioc_pkgs)[!(c(cran_pkgs, bioc_pkgs) %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(new_pkgs)) BiocManager::install(new_pkgs, update = FALSE)

```

```{r}

lapply(c(cran_pkgs, bioc_pkgs), library, character.only = TRUE)
```

```{bash}
mkdir -p data/data_ankur/reference data/raw data/trimmed reports

# Download TAIR10.1
wget -nc https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genomes/all/GCF/000/001/735/GCF_000001735.4_TAIR10.1/GCF_000001735.4_TAIR10.1_genomic.fna.gz -P data/data_ankur/reference/
wget -nc https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genomes/all/GCF/000/001/735/GCF_000001735.4_TAIR10.1/GCF_000001735.4_TAIR10.1_genomic.gtf.gz -P data/data_ankur/reference/
gunzip data/data_ankur/reference/*.gz
```
